config.content.title: Delivery Policy
config.content.body: This Delivery Policy covers the delivery of digital services and prize winnings on the RummyRoyal platform.
config.toc.items:
Digital Service Delivery|RummyRoyal is a digital platform. All games, features, and services are delivered electronically through our website and mobile app.
Account Credits|Deposits are credited to your RummyRoyal wallet instantly for most payment methods. Bank transfers may take 1-2 business days.
Winnings Delivery|Cash winnings are delivered to your registered bank account or UPI ID. Standard processing time is within 60 seconds for instant withdrawals.
Bonus Delivery|Welcome bonuses, referral rewards, and promotional credits are delivered to your bonus wallet as per the terms of each promotion.
Prize Delivery|Tournament prizes and special event rewards are credited within 24 hours of event completion. Physical prizes, if any, are shipped within 7-10 business days.
Service Availability|Our platform is available 24/7. Scheduled maintenance windows are communicated in advance via email and in-app notifications.
